_comment: The opening — plays once on the very first join of a fresh pack world, right after the auto-install provisions it (AutoInstall dispatches cutscene play opening). The camera lifts from outside Mom's house (2607.5/109/2847.5), drifts high over Sango Town, glances toward the lab hill (2674.5/128/2901.5), and settles back at the door. Corporate cold open — framed as a Company, Inc. internal memo; foreshadows the villain org without naming the Founder. Title kept short: vanilla titles render 4x and clip past ~24 chars at GUI scale 3. TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes to the town skyline.

cues.subtitle: §8Nobody files a report about a quiet town
